case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. GINA ANGELICA GUIDO MOTEGEGRO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED JAN-03-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOTEGEGRO, GINA ANGELICA GUIDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOTEGEGRO, GINA ANGELICA GUIDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JORGE EDUARDO PARRA RUIZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT MOTEGEGRO, GINA ANGELICA GUIDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
